title: COSEARCH: Jointly Training Reasoning Agent and Retrieval System for Agentic Search

defines.name: COSEARCH
defines.definition: A reinforcement learning framework that jointly trains a multi-step reasoning agent and a generative document ranker for agentic search.

problem: Fixed retrieval systems bottleneck RL-trained agentic search because the retrieval component does not adapt to the agent’s evolving queries and reasoning trajectories.
